summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: log10-scale distance axis 0..26 (meters). Six stacked color-coded method bands (radar, parallax, Cepheid, Type Ia SNe, redshift, CMB) with distance overlaps. Fixed markers at 10^7 Earth-radius, 10^11 AU, 10^16 light-year, 10^20 Milky Way, 10^22 Andromeda, 10^26 obs. universe. ValueTracker d_tr sweeps cursor with always_redraw reading + active method.
